overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains a strong, highly targeted professional presence across Bluesky, Mastodon, and LinkedIn. His content, which centers on computational social science, disinformation, and tool development, resonates deeply with an academic and research-focused audience, yielding high qualitative engagement relative to follower sizes.

contentThemes.description: Academic papers, event presentations, and discussions centered on tracking coordinated link sharing and information operations.
Hiring announcements for postdocs and PhD candidate opportunities within his research team.
Announcements and updates regarding open-source tools developed by the team, such as CooRnet.

recommendations: Leverage LinkedIn's larger reach for recruitment and high-impact funding milestones to tap into a broader professional pool.
Utilize Bluesky's highly active and responsive ecosystem to drive early discussion on newly published papers and upcoming conference presentations.
Incorporate visual assets, such as screenshots or system diagrams, when announcing software updates (e.g., CooRnet v2.0) on Mastodon to improve visual hook.

platformInsights.bluesky: Delivers the highest engagement rate per post (average 6.14%), driven by strong sharing behaviors (reposts) on academic and research opportunity content.
platformInsights.mastodon: Serves as a dedicated niche channel for technical tool releases and research methodologies, though total volume of interactions is lower.
platformInsights.linkedin: Generates the highest absolute engagement volume, making it the most effective channel for professional networking, institutional grant announcements, and job postings.

topPerformingContent.content: Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
New research opportunity for PhD students interested in computational social science. Reply for details!
Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.
